rag_rules: Latched expressions must be used only in component implementations, not in type scopes or invalid contexts
Binary expressions with 'and' require both operands to be of type 'bool'; fix type mismatches or invalid syntax
generic_rules: AGREE guarantees must reference only visible identifiers or locally declared helpers
Validator diagnostics pointing to '<error>' types indicate unresolved references that must be fixed at the source
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Latched expressions are restricted to input data ports or event expressions over input event data ports
Guarantee expressions must maintain consistent boolean types on both sides of binary operators
anti_patterns: Avoid placing latched expressions in component type scopes where they are not allowed
Do not attempt to repair type errors by adding architecture; instead, resolve the root cause of unresolved identifiers
